positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric arrangement of nocturnal forest elements, including glowing luna moths, crescent moon phases, and abstract constellations. The composition should feature bold, clean silhouettes set against a deep indigo cosmic gradient background. Use a limited palette of deep navy, teal, burnt orange, and luminous pale gold. Style: highly detailed linework, modern botanical illustration mixed with cosmic vaporwave aesthetic. Composition must be centered, balanced, and suitable for seamless apparel printing. Strong, crisp contrast with no gradients bleeding into the primary subject matter.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, lowres, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, tiling, poorly drawn hands, ugly, disfigured
